items: QPN Platform Track launching 2026: new track for ISVs building on Qualtrics Developer Platform. Consulting Track now formally separated — advisory partners vs. platform builders.
New tiering model: Platinum, Gold, Silver, Member. Recognition based on commercial impact and customer success, not technical depth.
Qualtrics targeting $2bn ARR through partner programme. New co-sell and lead-gen opportunities. Message: partners drive revenue.
X4 2026 (Seattle, 17–19 March): partner programme restructured around shared growth. APAC partner expansion accelerating.
